name: ASUS TUF GAMING Z790-PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7200(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Thunderbolt Header
shortName: ASUS TUF GAMING Z790-PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x
description: High-performance gaming ATX motherboard with LGA 1700 socket, PCIe 5.0 support, and Wi-Fi 6E connectivity.
